basic_details.job_title: Thane Municipal Corporation Specialist Doctor Recruitment 2026 – Walk in for 58 Panel Doctor Posts
basic_details.short_information: Thane Municipal Corporation (Thane Mahangarpalika) has released the Thane TMC Panel Doctor Recruitment 2026 notification for 58 specialist doctor (Panel Doctor) vacancies across 15 medical specialities. Eligible and willing medical specialists must appear in person for a walk-in interview on 03 July 2026 at 11:00 AM at the Medical Health Officer's office, 4th Floor, Mahanagar Bhavan, Chandanwadi, Pachpakhadi, Thane – 400602. The appointment is on a panel basis for a 3-year contractual period, serving maternity homes and hospitals within the Thane Municipal Corporation area.

qualification.details: To apply for the Thane Mahangarpalika Panel Doctor 2026, candidates must hold the minimum educational qualification listed for the respective speciality as shown in the vacancy table above. All applicants must hold a valid Maharashtra Medical Council (MMC) Registration Certificate and its renewal certificate. Doctors currently in government service must attach a No Objection Certificate (NOC) from their office. | MBBS with relevant postgraduate degree/diploma (MD/MS/DNB/DM/M.Ch.) as applicable to the speciality applied for. For Physiotherapist: MPTH or BPTH degree. The minimum qualification listed for each post is the bare minimum - candidates with higher qualifications and local experience will be given preference. | Maharashtra Medical Council (MMC) Registration Certificate is mandatory for all medical posts. MMC Registration Renewal Certificate must also be submitted. | Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now

MBBS, MD Paediatric, DCH DNB Paediatric
MBBS, M.Ch. in Urology or DNB in Urology
MBBS, MS/M.Ch. in Surgical Oncology or D.M. in Medical Oncology

salary_details.general medicine: Rs. 2,000/- fixed + Rs. 100/- per patient (max Rs. 5,000/- per visit); Fitness Certificate Rs. 1,000/- per patient
salary_details.chest physician: Rs. 2,000/- fixed + Rs. 100/- per patient (max Rs. 5,000/- per visit)
salary_details.pathologist: Rs. 2,500/- per visit (Two visits per week at required centre)
salary_details.ent: Rs. 2,000/- fixed + Rs. 100/- per patient (max Rs. 5,000/- per visit) - twice a week
salary_details.psychiatrist: Rs. 2,000/- fixed + Rs. 100/- per patient (max Rs. 5,000/- per visit) - twice a week
salary_details.physiotherapist: Rs. 2,000/- per visit (One visit per week at each required centre)
salary_details.dermatologist: Rs. 2,000/- fixed + Rs. 100/- per patient (max Rs. 5,000/- per visit) - twice a week
salary_details.ophthalmologist: Rs. 2,000/- fixed + Rs. 100/- per patient (max Rs. 5,000/- per visit) - twice a week
salary_details.urologist: Rs. 7,500/- fixed per OPD (minimum 10 patients mandatory); 2 visits per month
salary_details.oncologist: Rs. 7,500/- fixed per OPD (minimum 10 patients mandatory); 2 visits per month
salary_details.cardiologist: Rs. 7,500/- per visit (min. 10 patients); extra Rs. 500/- per 2D ECHO (max 5 per OPD); 2 visits per month
salary_details.details: Panel doctors under the Thane Mahangarpalika are paid on a case-basis or per-visit basis, not a fixed monthly salary. The remuneration varies by speciality, type of procedure (major/minor), and OPD visits per week. OPD charges are calculated at Rs. 100 per patient, with a maximum payment for up to 30 patients per OPD session.

selection_process: The selection process for the Thane TMC Panel Doctor Recruitment 2026 is straightforward - there is no written examination. Eligible doctors must present themselves in person with all original documents and attested copies at the designated venue on the walk-in date. The final decision on appointment rests entirely with Thane Municipal Corporation.
Walk-In Interview: Appear in person on 03 July 2026 at 11:00 AM at the Medical Health Officer's office
Thane – 400602. Document Verification: Submit all original certificates and attested copies. Final Selection: Based on qualifications

and interview assessment. Preference is given to doctors with higher qualifications and local/area experience. Empanelment: Selected doctors will be placed on the panel for 3 years for services at maternity homes
and health centres in the Thane Municipal Corporation area.
how_to_apply: There is no online application for the Thane Mahangarpalika Specialist Doctor Recruitment 2026. Candidates must download the prescribed application form from the official website, fill it out completely, and bring it on the day of the walk-in interview. Incomplete applications or those submitted without required documents will not be considered.
Download the prescribed application form (Arjachcha Namuna / अर्जाचा नमुना).
Print and fill in the form with all required personal, educational, and professional details.
Attach a passport-size photograph in the space provided on the form.
Attach attested copies of all required documents (see Documents Required section).
Report to: Medical Health Officer, Health Department, Mahanagar Bhavan, 4th Floor, Chandanwadi, Pachpakhadi, Thane – 400602.
Reach the venue by 11:00 AM on 03 July 2026 with originals and attested photocopies of all certificates.

content_sections.heading: Thane TMC Panel Doctor Recruitment 2026 PDF Download – Official Notification
content_sections.text: The official notification PDF for Thane Mahangarpalika Panel Doctor Bharti 2026 has been published on the Thane Municipal Corporation official website. Candidates should download and read the full notification carefully before appearing for the walk-in interview, as it contains the complete terms, conditions, payment structure, and application form. Thane TMC Panel Doctor Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF The notification number is: Thane-THAMPA/PRAO/Arogya/23E/2026 Notification Date: 24 June 2026

content_sections.heading: Thane TMC Panel Doctor Bharti 2026 - Overview
Thane TMC Panel Doctor Recruitment 2026 – Important Dates
content_sections.text: Candidates interested in the Thane Mahangarpalika Panel Doctor Bharti 2026 should note all key dates carefully. The walk-in interview is the only mode of application, and no applications will be accepted after the scheduled date and time. The notification was officially approved on 02 June 2026 by the Commissioner.

content_sections.heading: Thane Mahangarpalika Panel Doctor Vacancy 2026 – Post-Wise Details
content_sections.text: The Thane TMC Specialist Doctor Vacancy 2026 covers a wide range of medical disciplines. A total of 58 posts are available across 15 specialities in maternity homes and hospitals under Thane Municipal Corporation limits. Candidates must hold the required qualification for their specific speciality as listed below.

rows.qualification_required: MBBS, MS OBGY, D.G.O, DNB OBGY
MBBS, MD Anaesthesia, DA DNB Anaesthesia
MBBS, MD Paediatric, DCH DNB Paediatric
MBBS, M.Ch. in Urology or DNB in Urology
MBBS, MS/M.Ch. in Surgical Oncology or D.M. in Medical Oncology

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria for Thane TMC Panel Doctor Bharti 2026
content_sections.text: To apply for the Thane Mahangarpalika Panel Doctor 2026, candidates must hold the minimum educational qualification listed for the respective speciality as shown in the vacancy table above. All applicants must hold a valid Maharashtra Medical Council (MMC) Registration Certificate and its renewal certificate. Doctors currently in government service must attach a No Objection Certificate (NOC) from their office. MBBS with relevant postgraduate degree/diploma (MD/MS/DNB/DM/M.Ch.) as applicable to the speciality applied for. For Physiotherapist: MPTH or BPTH degree. The minimum qualification listed for each post is the bare minimum - candidates with higher qualifications and local experience will be given preference. Maharashtra Medical Council (MMC) Registration Certificate is mandatory for all medical posts. MMC Registration Renewal Certificate must also be submitted. content_sections.heading: Thane TMC Panel Doctor Salary 2026 – Payment Per Visit / OPD
content_sections.text: Panel doctors under the Thane Mahangarpalika are paid on a case-basis or per-visit basis , not a fixed monthly salary. The remuneration varies by speciality, type of procedure (major/minor), and OPD visits per week. OPD charges are calculated at Rs. 100 per patient , with a maximum payment for up to 30 patients per OPD session.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process – Thane Mahangarpalika Panel Doctor Walk-In Interview 2026
content_sections.text: The selection process for the Thane TMC Panel Doctor Recruitment 2026 is straightforward - there is no written examination. Eligible doctors must present themselves in person with all original documents and attested copies at the designated venue on the walk-in date. The final decision on appointment rests entirely with Thane Municipal Corporation. Walk-In Interview: Appear in person on 03 July 2026 at 11:00 AM at the Medical Health Officer's office, 4th Floor, Mahanagar Bhavan, Chandanwadi, Pachpakhadi, Thane – 400602. Document Verification: Submit all original certificates and attested copies. Final Selection: Based on qualifications, experience, and interview assessment. Preference is given to doctors with higher qualifications and local/area experience. Empanelment: Selected doctors will be placed on the panel for 3 years for services at maternity homes, hospitals, and health centres in the Thane Municipal Corporation area.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Thane TMC Panel Doctor Bharti 2026 – Walk-In Process
content_sections.text: There is no online application for the Thane Mahangarpalika Specialist Doctor Recruitment 2026. Candidates must download the prescribed application form from the official website, fill it out completely, and bring it on the day of the walk-in interview. Incomplete applications or those submitted without required documents will not be considered. Visit the official website: www.thanecity.gov.in Download the prescribed application form (Arjachcha Namuna / अर्जाचा नमुना). Print and fill in the form with all required personal, educational, and professional details. Attach a passport-size photograph in the space provided on the form. Attach attested copies of all required documents (see Documents Required section). Report to: Medical Health Officer, Health Department, Mahanagar Bhavan, 4th Floor, Chandanwadi, Pachpakhadi, Thane – 400602 . Reach the venue by 11:00 AM on 03 July 2026 with originals and attested photocopies of all certificates.

content_sections.heading: Thane TMC Panel Doctor Apply 2026 – Walk-In Registration (No Online Apply)
content_sections.text: There is no online application link for Thane Mahangarpalika Panel Doctor Recruitment 2026. The only method to apply is to appear in person at the walk-in interview with the filled application form and all required documents. Candidates should note that no TA/DA (Travelling Allowance or Dearness Allowance) will be paid for attending the walk-in interview or for the panel service. Walk-In Venue: Medical Health Officer, Health Department, Mahanagar Bhavan, 4th Floor, Chandanwadi, Pachpakhadi, Thane – 400602 Date: 03 July 2026 | Time: 11:00 AM

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for Thane Mahangarpalika Doctor Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates appearing for the Thane TMC Panel Doctor walk-in interview must carry all original documents along with attested photocopies. Missing or incomplete documentation may result in disqualification at the verification stage. Government employees must also bring an NOC from their current employer. Filled application form (downloaded from official website) Passport-size photograph (to be affixed on application form) Date of Birth proof Educational qualification certificates (degree, diploma) Mark sheets for all qualifying examinations Experience certificate(s) Maharashtra Medical Council (MMC) Registration Certificate MMC Registration Renewal Certificate Caste Certificate (if applicable, as per government rules) Residential address proof (MTNL/MSEB bill, Ration Card, Aadhar Card) NOC from current employer (for government employees) Small Family Declaration (as per Maharashtra Civil Services Small Family Norm Rules 2005 – Form A, Rule 4) - if applicable

content_sections.heading: Key Terms and Conditions – Thane TMC Panel Doctor 2026
content_sections.text: Before applying for Thane Mahangarpalika Tज्ञ डॉक्टर Bharti 2026, candidates must be aware of several important service conditions. Panel doctors will be required to serve at maternity homes, hospitals, and health centres within Thane Municipal Corporation limits. Being on the panel does not entitle the doctor to any claim of permanent employment with Thane Municipal Corporation. Service tenure: 3 years on a panel/contractual basis. Panel doctors must provide services at TMC maternity homes, hospitals, and health centres within the Thane corporation area. No TA/DA will be paid for any panel-related work or for attending the walk-in interview. Panel posts are on a honorary/visiting basis - panel status does not confer any right to TMC permanent employment. All decisions related to appointment will be final and binding on Thane Municipal Corporation. The corporation reserves the right to increase or decrease the number of vacancies without notice. Preference will be given to candidates with higher qualifications and local area experience. Amendments or corrections to the notification, if any, will be published on the official website.

content_sections.heading: Common Mistakes to Avoid – Thane TMC Panel Doctor Walk-In 2026
content_sections.text: Many candidates lose their opportunity at walk-in interviews due to avoidable errors. Being well-prepared with the right documents and meeting all conditions before arriving at the venue significantly improves your chances. Arriving late: The walk-in is at 11:00 AM sharp. Arriving even slightly late may result in not being considered. Plan to reach by 10:30 AM. Missing MMC Certificate: This is non-negotiable. Without a valid Maharashtra Medical Council registration and its renewal, your application will not be accepted. Applying for the wrong speciality: Ensure your postgraduate degree matches the qualification requirement of the post you are applying for. For example, a general MD without specialisation will not qualify for Cardiology. Unattested photocopies: Bring both originals and attested photocopies of every document. Self-attestation should include your name, signature, and date. No NOC for government employees: If you are currently employed in a government post, a No Objection Certificate from your head of office is mandatory. Incomplete application form: Fill in the form completely - full name, address, date of birth, qualifications with boards and marks, and work experience details. Wrong photograph size: The form specifies passport-size photograph. Do not use larger or informal photos. Missing Small Family Declaration: If you have more than two children born after 28 March 2005, carry Form A (Rule 4) as per Maharashtra Civil Services Small Family Norm Rules 2005.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Thane TMC Panel Doctor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no traditional last date — the only mode is walk-in interview. Candidates must appear in person on 03 July 2026 at 11:00 AM at the Medical Health Officer's office, Thane Mahangarpalika Bhavan.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in Thane Mahangarpalika Panel Doctor Bharti 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 58 specialist doctor posts are available across 15 medical specialities including Gynaecology, Anaesthesia, Paediatrics, Radiology, Cardiology, and more.

faq.question: Q3. Is there an application fee for Thane TMC Panel Doctor 2026?
faq.answer: The notification does not mention any application fee. Candidates are required to submit a filled form with documents — there is no fee payment involved.

faq.question: Q4. What is the qualification required for Thane TMC Panel Doctor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold MBBS with a relevant postgraduate degree or diploma (MD/MS/DNB/DM/M.Ch.) matching the applied speciality. For Physiotherapist posts, MPTH or BPTH is required. Maharashtra Medical Council registration is mandatory for all medical posts.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for Thane Mahangarpalika Panel Doctor 2026?
faq.answer: Panel doctors are not paid a fixed monthly salary. Payment is on a per-visit or per-case basis, ranging from Rs. 500/- per sonography (Radiology) to Rs. 7,500/- per OPD visit (Urologist, Oncologist, Cardiologist). OPD payments are calculated at Rs. 100 per patient with a maximum cap of Rs. 5,000/- per visit for most specialities.

faq.question: Q6. Is the Thane TMC Panel Doctor post permanent or contractual?
faq.answer: This is a contractual panel appointment for 3 years. Being on the panel does not grant any right to permanent employment with Thane Municipal Corporation.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in interview venue for Thane Mahangarpalika Panel Doctor Bharti 2026?
faq.answer: The venue is: Medical Health Officer, Health Department, 4th Floor, Mahanagar Bhavan, Chandanwadi, Pachpakhadi, Thane – 400602.

faq.question: Q8. Is MMC registration mandatory for Thane TMC Doctor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, Maharashtra Medical Council (MMC) registration certificate and its renewal certificate are mandatory for all medical specialist posts under this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. Will TA/DA be paid to doctors attending the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: No. The official notification clearly states that no TA/DA (Travelling Allowance or Dearness Allowance) will be paid for attending the walk-in or for services rendered on the panel.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form for Thane TMC Panel Doctor 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form (अर्जाचा नमुना) are available at the official website: www.thanecity.gov.in. The notification number is Thane-THAMPA/PRAO/Arogya/23E/2026, dated 24 June 2026.
